textByHash.d260fad13a742d3b1e0da92ceaec721c107820a0: Arrr, it be a sad tale. I used to sail the seven seas, a-lootin' and a-plunderin' whatever took my fancy.
textByHash.8ed04eae2a4c35e30579222c403cde2e96f10886: Then I got a conscience, so I stopped being a pirate, and travelled the world giving back some of the loot I'd taken.
textByHash.79c11203d6d584da69158cac095d3471c165325a: Seems people didn't appreciate me interruptin' their business to give 'em free stuff, so now I'm locked up for harassment.
textByHash.41560f2c94d04535c9fbc423d34a649e7d6b7b12: Nothing, eh? Nothing be all I got, anyway.
